name: validate port config result codes
description: This project's convention for validation functions: return a Result, never raise or return a bare bool.
steps: Validation functions must NOT raise and must NOT return a bare bool. They return Result(ok, code) imported from the result module (from result import Result).

Use these exact failure codes (uppercase SCREAMING_SNAKE): a value that is not an integer is Result(False, 'NOT_AN_INTEGER'); an integer outside 1..65535 inclusive is Result(False, 'PORT_OUT_OF_RANGE').
The code field must equal the catalog string exactly - no messages or punctuation.
